key.name: icon-visibility
key.description: This specifies when the microphone icon in the topbar is visible.

key.name: keybinding-toggle-mute
key.description: These shortcut keys will mute or unmute the microphone when pressed once, and will act as a push-to-talk button when held down.

key.name: show-osd
key.description: This specifies whether to show OSD notification.

key.name: play-feedback-sounds
key.summary: Play sound when muting and unmuting
key.description: Play sounds when the microphone is muted and unmuted.

key.name: keybinding-mode
key.description: auto: tap to toggle, hold for push-to-talk or push-to-mute; push-to-talk: hold to unmute, release to mute; push-to-mute: hold to mute, release to unmute; toggle: tap to toggle only.
